title: neoporteria neohankeana
intro: Neoporteria neohankeana, also known as Chilean wine berry, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the Euphorbiaceae family. Traditionally, this plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include its ability to treat various health conditions such as inflammation, fever, and digestive issues. The health benefits of Neoporteria neohankeana include its antioxidant and anti-inflammatory properties, which can help protect against cell damage and promote overall well-being. In terms of herbal preparations, the plant's berries can be made into a wine or infused in water to create a tea that can be used to treat various health conditions.
